prompt: Keep canonical interface names in CLI help
note: Fixed dynamic parameter matching so interface names can be entered case-insensitively while help output keeps only canonical names such as NULL0 and InLoopBack0. Removed lowercase aliases from IFNET parameter providers and moved case-insensitive comparison into the parser.

+

Add InLoopBack0 and IPv4 loopback direct routes

+

Added built-in VVRP InLoopBack0 IFNET interface, IP-owned 127.0.0.1/8 address state, and RM generation of both 127.0.0.0/8 and 127.0.0.1/32 Direct routes. FIB sync now carries loopback forwarding entries alongside Ethernet connected routes.

+

Align built-in interfaces and CLI case handling

+

Set InLoopBack0 IFNET index to 0x0 and NULL0 to 0xffff, blocked interface view entry for InLoopBack0, made VVRP interface lookups case-insensitive with canonical names, and made command literal parsing globally case-insensitive. Also retained IP-owned 127.0.0.1/8 loopback route generation.

+
